name: ai-sweatshop
description: Pixel-art AI agent monitor — watch your AI workers in a virtual office. Real-time visualization of Claude Code sessions, sub-agents, tool calls, and team structure as animated pixel characters.

hooks.command: cat | curl -sf -X POST http://localhost:7777/events -H 'Content-Type: application/json' --data-binary @- 2>/dev/null || true
